nasb.text: In their streets they have girded themselves with sackcloth; On their housetops and in their squares Everyone is wailing, dissolved in tears.

esv.text: in the streets they wear sackcloth; on the housetops and in the squares everyone wails and melts in tears.

cnv.text: 他們在街上都腰束麻布； 在房頂上，在廣場上， 各人都哀號，流淚痛哭。

ccb.text: 他们身披麻衣走在街上， 房顶和广场上都传出号啕大哭的声音。

csbs.text: 在街上，他们束上麻布； 在屋顶上、在广场上， 人人哀号，流泪哭泣。
